Objective

To analyze Nalini Store’s annual sales data for 2026 and understand customer behavior, sales trends, and business performance.

Problems to Solve
Compare sales and orders.
Find the highest sales month.
Identify who purchased more (Men or Women).
Analyze different order statuses.
Study the relationship between age and gender based on orders.
Identify the top sales channel.
Solution

An interactive dashboard was created using Excel/Google Sheets with pivot tables, charts, slicers, and data visualization techniques to analyze sales performance and customer trends.

Analysis

The analysis shows that March had the highest sales and orders during 2026. Women customers contributed the highest sales share (64%), and adult customers placed the maximum number of orders. Amazon was the top-performing sales channel with the highest contribution to total orders. Most orders were successfully delivered (92.3%), indicating strong business performance.

Conclusion

The dashboard helps Nalini Store understand customer purchasing behavior, identify top-performing sales channels, and improve future marketing and sales strategies for business growth.
